name: refactor_004_split_bloated_function
description: Break a single large release-summary builder into smaller helper functions while preserving the rendered output.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this task is a refactor because the required work is to decompose one large function into named helpers while keeping output semantics intact. It is not a disguised bug fix because the hidden checks validate helper-based delegation rather than a changed product behavior.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the function combines header, artifact, warning, and note sections, so the solver must preserve formatting across multiple inputs while introducing helper seams.
